title: cheirostylis tairae
intro: Cheirostylis tairae, also known as Tairae Cheirostylis or Tairae, is a species of flowering plant in the family Diapensiaceae. It is native to the mountainous regions of Taiwan. The medicinal properties of Cheirostylis tairae include its potential to act as an anti-inflammatory agent and to possess antioxidant and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of this plant include its use in treating fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions, and it is also believed to have anti-cancer and anti-aging properties, with herbal preparations often including it in teas, infusions, and tinctures.
